Path 1 (Caster Build with Shojin + Dmg): Power Frame > Coolant > Coolant > Void Coefficient > Tank Buster > AP Rounds > Anything
Path 2 (Melee Build with Bruiser Items): Assault Frame > Melt Through > Grav Booster > Grav Booster > Heavy Plating > Shockwave > Anything
